testsuite.name: agentforge.agent.LLMClientTest

testcase.name: complete sends request and returns response text
complete with system prompt includes it in request
request includes model and temperature from config
retries on transient failure and succeeds

testsuite.system-out: 09:05:05.297 [] WARN agentforge.agent.LLMClient -- LLM request failed (attempt 1/3): Always fails 09:05:05.310 [] WARN agentforge.agent.LLMClient -- LLM request failed (attempt 2/3): Always fails 09:05:05.335 [] WARN agentforge.agent.LLMClient -- LLM request failed (attempt 3/3): Always fails 09:05:05.342 [] WARN agentforge.agent.LLMClient -- LLM request failed (attempt 1/4): Server error 500 09:05:05.354 [] WARN agentforge.agent.LLMClient -- LLM request failed (attempt 2/4): Server error 500
